qa_pair.question: Use vision_analyze_image on tests/fixtures/ui_login.png. What UI element is typically in the center?
Use vision_extract_text on tests/fixtures/terminal_error.png with source_type=terminal. What Python error appears?
Use vision_understand_diagram on tests/fixtures/arch.png with diagram_type=architecture. How many main layers are shown?
Use vision_analyze_data_viz on tests/fixtures/chart.png. What is the highest value month?
Use vision_diagnose_error on tests/fixtures/error_404.png. What HTTP status code is shown?
Use vision_ui_diff_check comparing tests/fixtures/ui_v1.png and tests/fixtures/ui_v2.png. What changed between the two screenshots?
Use vision_ui_to_artifact on tests/fixtures/calculator_ui.png with target=html. What kind of component is generated?
Use vision_analyze_video on tests/fixtures/demo.mp4 with detail=brief. What field in the response indicates the analysis detail level?
